creator: yznalslm@gmail.com
text:
I was having the same problem with the installer on my Thinkpad P16s Gen 1 AMD (6840U)

So I installed FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE using an external keyboard, downloaded the kernel sources, applied John's patch, recompiled the kernel, added `hint.uart.1.disabled=1` to /boot/device.hints and now, finally, everything works!
